subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath created the earth and the heavens, and hath made them the open book of His clear signs, and hath brought forth the suns [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن خلق الارض و السموات و جعلها منشور ایاته البینات و انشا الشموس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
